Group by month (YYYY-MM format) and country to get per-group statistics.
Use TO_CHAR(trans_date, 'YYYY-MM') in PostgreSQL to extract the month.
For approved-only counts and sums, use CASE WHEN state = 'approved' inside your aggregate functions.
SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) counts approved transactions.
